# daytona_update_job_status (Action)

Updates a Daytona background job status. This action is intended for runner/job-worker integrations.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_id` (String) Daytona job ID.
- `status` (String) New Daytona job status. Supported values are: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, FAILED.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `error_message` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Optional error message when marking a job failed.
- `result_metadata` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Optional result metadata string to attach to the job status update.
